sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! Ka theih ma-in hong it hi;
Ki-itna khau tawh hong kai-a, Amah
tawh hong henkhawm hi.
Keima lungsim hong khih khin a, Kuamah in phel zolo hi;
Kei Ama aa, Amah
kei aa, A tawntung ding hita hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! Hong hon dingin hong si
hi;
Nuntakna bek hong pia lo a, Amah mah hong kipia hi.
Kei neihsa bangmah om lo a, Ama neihsa
hikhin hi;
Lungsimi thatang le nuntakna, Ama aa hi tawntung hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kei in lawm hoih khat
ka nei a! vangliatna khempeuh nei hi;
Ka lampi ah hong cing ding a, Innpi ah hong kha ding
hi.
Minthanna taang ka galmuh ta, Hong thahatsak kik ding hi;
Tu’n vil ding, sem ding, do
ding a, Nung ciang kitawlnga ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kei in lawm hoih khat ka nei a! Migi thuman, lungnem
hi;
Vaihawm siampa lamhilh siampa, thahat galdo siampa hi.
Hong it Topa ka nei khinta, hong khenzo
ding omlo hi;
Sihna’n hong khen zolo dinga, Topa aa ka hita hi.
